title: Device Home Screen - Bluetooth turned off
scenario: Verify headset shows as connected in device list after reconnecting via Bluetooth settings when Bluetooth was toggled off and back on
steps: Launch the app with a Bluetooth headset already connected.
Turn off Bluetooth while the app is running.
Observe the device list in the app to confirm the headset is shown as disconnected.
Reconnect the headset via mobile Bluetooth settings.
Observe the device list in the app.
expected: The headset should be shown as connected in the device list.
